fields.title: Refactor task runner to support pluggable worker backend
fields.description: Prepare extensions/task for swapping the worker execution model.nnScopen- Identify code in extensions/task/src/runner.ts that is specific to child_process.spawn('pi')n- Introduce an internal abstraction (e.g. WorkerBackend) so we can implement InProcessWorkerBackend without rewriting higher-level logicnnDoDn- Clear separation between: (a) worker session orchestration, (b) backend executionn- No behavior changes yet
fields.close_reason: Refactored TaskRunner with WorkerBackend abstraction while keeping subprocess backend}
